name: python3-aiohttp-socks
title: python3-aiohttp-socks
description:
SOCKS proxy connector for aiohttp (Python 3)
SOCKS proxy connector for aiohttp that supports SOCKS4(a) and SOCKS5.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-aiohttp-socks because SOCKS proxy connector for aiohttp (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-aiohttp-socks as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-aiohttp-socks with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-aiohttp-socks --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
